title: pilosella aurantiaca subsp. melinoides
intro: Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. melinoides, also known as the Autumn Hawk's-beard or a subspecies of the Pilosella aurantiaca, is a flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. melinoides include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
